title: Measurements of business size
summary: 9609 AS — revenue, employees, capital employed, and market share as size measures.
learningObjectives: List methods of measuring business size.

simpleExplanation.title: How big is the firm?
simpleExplanation.summary: No single measure is perfect — revenue ignores profit, employees ignore capital intensity, market share needs industry context.

sections.content: **Business size** (1.3.1) supports **growth** and **objectives** topics. Evaluate **which measure fits** the industry in the stem.
